# leifwind_project (Data Source)

Look up a single project by id or exact name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by id.
data "leifwind_project" "by_id" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

# Look up by exact name.
data "leifwind_project" "by_name" {
  name = "library"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Project object id (UUID).
- `name` (String) Exact project name.

### Read-Only

- `unique_key` (String) Server-computed natural key (for projects: equals the name).
